description: Exact RASR reproduction uses the archived frozen heading prediction column. The column is the phi_i source consumed by the protocol-specific calibration module.
source_column_sha256_format: heading_pred formatted as %.6f with LF line endings and no header

provenance.unit: one official row / one image pair
provenance.combiner: fixed circular weighted average over per-row heading predictions
provenance.packager_contract: heading_predictions.csv contains one heading_pred value per row, aligned with distance rows
